visual_dna.age_range: ~25-30 — he and John are likely younger than Peter
visual_dna.skin_tone: tanned from outdoor fishing life on the Sea of Galilee
visual_dna.beard_style: medium beard, younger looking than Peter
visual_dna.eye_color: dark brown — hot, reactive, quick to flare
visual_dna.height_build: strong and physical from fishing — slightly leaner than Peter
distinguishing_marks: named 'Son of Thunder' with John — the name suggests fire and volume
in Luke 9:54 wants to call fire down on Samaritans — Jesus rebukes him
present at the Transfiguration (inner circle: Peter, James, John)

wardrobe_by_arc.fishing_call: fisherman's working clothes, mending nets when called
wardrobe_by_arc.ministry: simple traveling robe — left the boat with Peter and John

voice_profile.pace: fast, reactive — the kind of person who finishes sentences before thinking
voice_profile.accent_note: Galilean — same regional accent as Peter and John
speech_mannerisms: speaks in tandem with John — they often seem to finish each other's thoughts
the fire-calling proposal in Luke 9 — bold, impulsive, confident he knows what righteousness looks like
Jesus rebukes him without anger — 'You do not know what spirit you are of'
voice_profile.notes: James is defined partly by his fiery temper and partly by being in the inner circle. He and John requested seats at Jesus's right and left — audacious ask.

emotional_arc.opening: Fisherman with his father Zebedee — called alongside John by Jesus on the same day as Peter.
emotional_arc.midpoint: Inner circle — present at Jairus's daughter, Transfiguration. The fire being slowly shaped.
emotional_arc.climax: Luke ends before James's martyrdom — but he is the first apostle killed (Acts 12:2). His arc is incomplete in Luke, but the shape of what he becomes is visible.
emotional_arc.resolution: Following, learning — not yet the leader he will be, not yet the martyr.

evangelical_baptist.notes: The inner circle disciple — his zeal is relatable, his rebukes teachable
evangelical_baptist.marketing_angle: He wanted to call fire from heaven. Jesus said no. That's a lesson.

catholic.notes: St. James the Greater — patron of pilgrims, the Camino de Santiago
catholic.marketing_angle: The apostle whose shrine draws millions every year. This is who he was before he was a saint.

black_church.notes: The zealous one, refined by proximity to Jesus
black_church.marketing_angle: His zeal was real. Jesus just redirected it.

hispanic_christian.notes: Santiago — patron saint of Spain and Latin America, deeply embedded in Hispanic identity
hispanic_christian.marketing_angle: Santiago — millions have walked the Camino in his name. This is where it started.

secular_curious.notes: The disciple who wanted to call fire from heaven — a very human impulse
secular_curious.marketing_angle: He saw a Samaritan village reject Jesus. His first instinct was: burn it down. Jesus said no.

youth_gen_z.notes: The hot-headed one who gets rebuked — relatable
youth_gen_z.marketing_angle: He wanted justice. He just had the wrong method. Jesus didn't kick him out for it.

jewish_american.marketing_angle: A Galilean fisherman of the 1st century — his world authentically rendered

women.marketing_angle: The brother who followed his whole life and died for it first

men.notes: The hot-headed man who is being shaped — his arc is deeply relatable for men
men.marketing_angle: He was the angriest one. Jesus kept him in the inner circle anyway.

audience_targeting.modern_parallel: The passionate hothead who's actually right about justice but wrong about methods
audience_targeting.modern_parallel_detail: His impulse to call fire on the Samaritans comes from genuine righteousness misdirected. Jesus doesn't reject him — he redirects him.

ai_generation.consistency_seed_prompt: 1st century Jewish Galilean fisherman man age 25-30, tanned skin from outdoor life, dark hair, medium beard, strong build from fishing, simple tunic and travel robe, Sea of Galilee or Galilean countryside setting, cinematic photoreal, natural daylight, 8k
ai_generation.negative_prompt: old man, fine robes, European features, cartoonish, halo
ai_generation.midjourney_style_params: cinematic photoreal, natural warm daylight, Galilean fishing world
ai_generation.firefly_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a young 1st century Jewish Galilean fisherman, age 25-30, tanned skin, dark hair, medium beard, strong build, simple worn traveling tunic, Sea of Galilee backdrop, natural warm daylight, energetic expression
reference_films: The Chosen TV series — for fisherman disciple world-building
ai_generation.color_grading_notes: Warm Galilean light — same palette as Peter but slightly younger energy.

production_notes: James and John should be cast as clearly brothers — similar features, similar energy, but James slightly more dominant/louder.
